description: Auth0 Universal Login (hosted /u/login/* pages). The fresh login state lives in a hidden form input on the login page, NOT in the /authorize query; single-use plumbing hops must be folded, not replayed.
llmFlowNotes: Auth0 Universal Login detected: the fresh login state is a hidden input (input[name="state"]) on the login page body — CSS-extract it there and thread it through every /u/login/* request (query, body, Referer). The /authorize query state/nonce are RP-side values that replay fine as recorded literals.
Do not replay /authorize/resume or /oauth/token as standalone samplers — they carry single-use codes and are auto-followed inside redirect chains.
expectations: login state CSS-extracted from hidden input on the login page
auto-submit bridge pages get no text assertions
